testcase.name: Namespace definitions and redefinitions
testcase.description: Test that the XBRL processor has properly implemented the XML names specification. Normative reference can be found here http://www.w3.org/TR/REC-xml-names/

variation.name: 402-01-namespace-definitions-and-redefinitions
variation.description:
The instance document is not using standard prefixes on the elements. The prefixes are also redefined in the nested elements so, for example, the same prefix is used in different levels of the XML hierarchy and is legally redefined to target a different namespace.
A conformant XML processor shall consider the XBRL instance a valid XBRL document and shall properly bind the prefixes to the namespaces on every element where the prefix is used
(valid case)
